mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO interview
application_id, company_id, job_id, user_id, hr_user_id, interview_time, interview_location, location_type, contact_person, contact_phone, remark, status, candidate_remark, response_time, created_at, updated_at,
#{applicationId}, #{companyId}, #{jobId}, #{userId}, #{hrUserId}, #{interviewTime}, #{interviewLocation}, #{locationType}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactPhone}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{candidateRemark}, #{responseTime}, now(), now(),
mapper.update: UPDATE interview SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
